title: Kronex spaceport
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Kronex spaceport''' was a considerably large [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] in the [[Llon Nebulae/Legends|Llon Nebulae]] that served its visitors with a variety of [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]].

The [[Storm Fleet]] made a stop in the spaceport during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], used their local contact [[Fizz (individual)|Fizz]] to covertly learn the purpose and destination of the fleet.

==Appearances==
